backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing a school management system with student, teacher, fee, attendance, and report card management, including role-based access control, blob storage, and activity audit logging.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting three footer styling changes: reducing font size, changing text color to black, and maintaining modern font family (Inter/Poppins/Montserrat).
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend components including authentication, dashboard, student/teacher/fee/attendance management, PWA configuration, and styling with premium OKLCH color system and gradient effects.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, including sidebar, chart, and destructive color variants.
frontend/index.html: Main HTML entry point with PWA meta tags, manifest link, favicon references, and School Mitra branding configuration for mobile and desktop.
frontend/public/manifest.json: PWA manifest defining School Mitra app metadata, icons (192x192 and 512x512), standalone display mode, and education/productivity categories.
frontend/public/offline.html: Styled offline fallback page with gradient background, icon container, and retry button for when the app is offline, supporting both light and dark color schemes.
frontend/public/service-worker.js: Service worker implementing cache-first strategy for static assets, network-first with cache fallback for API calls, excluding Internet Identity URLs, with cache versioning and offline page support.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main application component that handles authentication flow, actor initialization, user profile loading, and conditionally renders LoginScreen, ProfileSetupModal, or Dashboard based on authentication and profile state.
frontend/src/components/ActivityLogSecti: Displays a filterable table of activity audit logs with role and action filters, showing timestamps, performer details, and actions with color-coded badges for different roles and action types.
frontend/src/components/AttendanceSectio: Admin-only component with tabs for marking daily attendance and viewing monthly attendance summaries, allowing bulk attendance submission and displaying attendance statistics.
frontend/src/components/DashboardOvervie: Displays dashboard metrics in card format showing total students, teachers, fee statistics, and other key metrics with loading states, error handling, and formatted currency values.
frontend/src/components/FeesSection.tsx: Manages fee records with search and filter capabilities, displays fee statistics (paid/unpaid), and provides dialogs for adding, editing, and deleting fee records with student selection.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer component displaying copyright information and attribution to TixtedEdits with dark mode support.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Navigation header showing School Mitra branding with logo, displays logged-in user profile information, and provides logout functionality with query cache clearing.
frontend/src/components/LoginScreen.tsx: Login screen component with tabs for admin (Internet Identity) and teacher (username/password) authentication, featuring gradient styling and error handling.
frontend/src/components/OfflineIndicator: Displays a fixed alert banner at the top of the screen when the user goes offline, indicating cached data viewing mode.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog for first-time admin profile setup requiring name input, non-dismissible until profile is created.
frontend/src/components/PWAInstallPrompt: Shows a dismissible card prompt in the bottom-right corner to install the app as a PWA with offline functionality.
frontend/src/components/ReportCardsSecti: Manages student report cards with add/edit dialogs, subject marks entry, filtering by student/class, and displays cards in a table with grade badges.
Student management interface with search/filter, add/edit/delete operations, displays students in a table with avatar, class badge, and contact info.
Teacher management section (admin-only) with add/edit/delete operations, credential management, search functionality, and displays teachers with subject and class assignments.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that manages the backend actor instance using React Query, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on Internet Identity state and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/usePWAInstall.ts: React hook that manages Progressive Web App installation prompts, handling beforeinstallprompt events, user dismissals with 7-day cooldown, and installation state tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for all backend operations including user profiles, teacher authentication, dashboard metrics, students, teachers, fees, attendance, report cards, and activity logs with error handling and toast notifications.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS configuration with custom design tokens using OKLCH color space, defining light/dark theme variables, premium gradient utilities, glass effects, and modal styling.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility functions including cn() for merging Tailwind classes and formatINR() for formatting numbers as Indian Rupees with proper lakhs/crores grouping.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client and Internet Identity provider, then renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page with tabbed navigation for overview, students, teachers, fees, attendance, report cards, and activity logs, with role-based tab visibility for admin and teacher users.
frontend/src/registerServiceWorker.ts: Service worker registration utility that registers the PWA service worker on page load and listens for updates to notify users when new versions are available.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support and methods to clear sensitive parameters from the URL.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom theme extensions including HSL-based color system, custom shadows (premium, glow effects), animations (float, glow, shimmer), and Inter font family, using tailwindcss-animate and typography plugins.
project_state.json: Project state document describing a school management PWA with multi-role authentication (Admin/Teacher), role-based access control, offline capabilities, attendance/fee management, and activity audit logging, currently at version 17.
